videoPrompt:
分镜一：雨夜行车 / Shot 1: Driving in the Rainy Night
项
中文
English
景别
车内中景，副驾视角拍摄驾驶员
Medium shot, inside the car, from passenger-seat POV
构图
易灵风位于画面右侧，左侧是车窗雨幕和模糊的路灯光影。前挡风玻璃上雨刮器来回摆动，形成动态前景
Yi Lingfeng on the right side of frame. Left side: rain-streaked window and blurred streetlamp halos. Windshield wipers swing back and forth across the foreground.
运镜手法
固定机位，手持轻微浮动，模拟车辆行驶的颠簸感
Locked-off position, handheld micro-float, simulating the bump of a moving car.
画面内容
易灵风坐在驾驶座上，嘴角叼着烟（没点），一手搭在方向盘上，一手轻敲节奏，嘴里吹着不成调的口哨。车外暴雨如注，路灯在雨幕中晕成一个个黄圈。T字路口的反光标识从车前掠过。他左眉尾的小痣在仪表台微光下隐约可见。
Yi Lingfeng sits in the driver's seat, an unlit cigarette in the corner of his mouth. One hand rests on the wheel, the other taps a rhythm on the door. He whistles an off-key tune. Outside, rain pours down; streetlamps bleed into yellow halos through the curtain of water. A T-junction reflective sign glides past the windshield. The small mole at his left eyebrow tail is faintly lit by dashboard glow.
